name: revolutx-mcp
description: MCP server for the Revolut X Crypto Exchange — check account balances, place and cancel orders, view order books, tickers, candlestick data, and public trades.

tools.name: generate_keypair
tools.description: Generate an Ed25519 key pair and save it to the config directory for Revolut X API authentication

tools.name: configure_api_key
tools.description: Save your Revolut X API key to the local config file so subsequent tools can authenticate requests

tools.name: check_auth_status
tools.description: Verify that API key and private key are configured, and test the connection to the Revolut X API

tools.name: get_balances
tools.description: Get your Revolut X account balances for all held cryptocurrencies and fiat currencies

tools.name: get_currencies
tools.description: List all currencies available on the Revolut X exchange with their deposit/withdrawal status

tools.name: get_currency_pairs
tools.description: List all tradeable currency pairs on Revolut X with their min/max order sizes and tick sizes

tools.name: get_order_book
tools.description: Get the current order book (bids and asks) for a specified trading pair on Revolut X

tools.name: get_tickers
tools.description: Get current bid, ask, mid, and last prices for all trading pairs on Revolut X

tools.name: get_candles
tools.description: Get OHLCV candlestick data for a specified trading pair and time interval from Revolut X

tools.name: get_public_trades
tools.description: Get the most recent public trades for a specified trading pair on Revolut X

tools.name: get_last_trades
tools.description: Get the last 100 public trades across all trading pairs on Revolut X

tools.name: place_market_order
tools.description: Place a market buy or sell order for a specified trading pair and amount on Revolut X

tools.name: place_limit_order
tools.description: Place a limit buy or sell order at a specified price for a trading pair on Revolut X

tools.name: get_active_orders
tools.description: List your currently open (unfilled) orders on Revolut X, optionally filtered by pair

tools.name: cancel_order
tools.description: Cancel a specific open order on Revolut X by its order ID

tools.name: get_client_trades
tools.description: Get your personal trade history (filled orders) on Revolut X, optionally filtered by pair

tools.name: grid_backtest
tools.description: Run a grid trading backtest on historical candlestick data for a specified pair, grid range, and level count

tools.name: grid_optimize
tools.description: Test multiple grid parameter combinations on historical data and rank results by profit

tools.name: alert_create
tools.description: Create a technical-analysis alert (price, RSI, MACD, EMA cross, Bollinger, volume spike, spread, OBI, price change %, ATR breakout) for a trading pair. Requires the Worker service.

tools.name: alert_list
tools.description: List all configured alerts with their type, trading pair, enabled/triggered status, and last check time. Requires the Worker service.

tools.name: alert_get
tools.description: Get full details of a specific alert by its ID, including configuration and trigger history. Requires the Worker service.

tools.name: alert_enable
tools.description: Enable a previously disabled alert so the Worker resumes evaluating it. Requires the Worker service.

tools.name: alert_disable
tools.description: Disable an alert to pause evaluation without deleting its configuration. Requires the Worker service.

tools.name: alert_delete
tools.description: Permanently delete an alert and its configuration. Requires the Worker service.

tools.name: alert_types
tools.description: List all 10 supported alert types with their config fields, defaults, and example configurations. Requires the Worker service.

tools.name: telegram_add_connection
tools.description: Add a Telegram Bot API connection for alert notifications. Connects to the user-configured Telegram Bot API (external service). Requires the Worker service.

tools.name: telegram_list_connections
tools.description: List all configured Telegram bot connections with their enabled status and last test result. Connects to the user-configured Telegram Bot API (external service). Requires the Worker service.

tools.name: telegram_delete_connection
tools.description: Remove a Telegram bot connection and stop using it for notifications. Requires the Worker service.

tools.name: telegram_enable_connection
tools.description: Enable a previously disabled Telegram connection so it receives alert notifications. Requires the Worker service.

tools.name: telegram_disable_connection
tools.description: Disable a Telegram connection to pause notifications without deleting its configuration. Requires the Worker service.

tools.name: telegram_test_connection
tools.description: Send a test message through a Telegram bot connection to verify it is working. Connects to the user-configured Telegram Bot API (external service). Requires the Worker service.

tools.name: worker_status
tools.description: Get the current status of the background Worker service including uptime, active alerts, and enabled connections

tools.name: worker_stop
tools.description: Stop the Worker background tick loop, pausing all alert evaluation and notifications

tools.name: worker_restart
tools.description: Restart the Worker background tick loop to pick up configuration changes

tools.name: events_list
tools.description: List recent system events (alert triggers, Telegram sends, worker starts/stops) with optional category filter. Requires the Worker service.

config_dir.title: Config Directory
config_dir.description: Directory for storing API keys and configuration

worker_url.title: Worker URL
worker_url.description: URL of the RevolutX Worker service (needed for alerts and Telegram tools). Start Worker with: cd revolutx-ai && docker compose up -d
